所有程序包的分层结构

程序包分层结构:
  • com.easylive.web,
  • com.easylive.web.annotation,
  • com.easylive.web.aspect,
  • com.easylive.web.component,
  • com.easylive.web.controller,
  • com.easylive.web.task

类分层结构

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.easylive.web.controller.ABaseController
      • com.easylive.web.controller.AccountController
      • com.easylive.web.controller.AGlobalExceptionHandlerController
      • com.easylive.web.controller.CategoryController
      • com.easylive.web.controller.FileController
      • com.easylive.web.controller.SysSettingController
      • com.easylive.web.controller.TestController
      • com.easylive.web.controller.UcenterInteractionController
      • com.easylive.web.controller.UcenterStatisticsController
      • com.easylive.web.controller.UcenterVideoPostController
      • com.easylive.web.controller.UhomeController
      • com.easylive.web.controller.UhomeVideoSeriesController
      • com.easylive.web.controller.UserActionController
      • com.easylive.web.controller.UserMessageController
      • com.easylive.web.controller.VideoCommentController
      • com.easylive.web.controller.VideoController
      • com.easylive.web.controller.VideoDanmuController
      • com.easylive.web.controller.VideoPlayHistoryController
    • com.easylive.web.EasyliveWebRunApplication
    • com.easylive.web.task.ExecuteQueueTask
    • com.easylive.web.aspect.GlobalOperationAspect
    • com.easylive.web.InitRun (implements org.springframework.boot.ApplicationRunner)
    • org.springframework.data.redis.listener.KeyspaceEventMessageListener (implements org.springframework.beans.factory.DisposableBean, org.springframework.beans.factory.InitializingBean, org.springframework.data.redis.connection.MessageListener)
      • org.springframework.data.redis.listener.KeyExpirationEventMessageListener (implements org.springframework.context.ApplicationEventPublisherAware)
        • com.easylive.web.component.RedisKeyExpirationListener
    • com.easylive.web.task.SysTask

注释类型分层结构

  • com.easylive.web.annotation.GlobalInterceptor (implements java.lang.annotation.Annotation)
